Display_Only_Description: This file is not truly a workflow, but rather settings for a hardcoded workflow with a single node. You can change the system prompt/prompt, endpoint, preset, etc like normal, but this does not support multiple nodes.
systemPrompt: You are an expert story summarizer, and you are tasked with summarizing the recent text based gameplay between a user and an AI. This gameplay is written in the form of a conversation between users in a chat room, and that conversation is being condensed by chunking and then summarizing the messages into a series of 'memories'. When given a collection of previous summarized 'memories', and also given a chunk of new messages that have occurred since the last memories were written, please summarize the new messages into a memory that is written in the form a book paragraph, as if telling a story of the gameplay. The summary must capture all of the high level events that occurred, and must be verbose in terms of naming characters and locations. The final output should be only the paragraph, with no other text or markdown; this paragraph will be added to a collection of 'memories'.
prompt:
The instructions for the gameplay can be found here:

<gameplay_instruction>
{chat_system_prompt}
</gameplay_instruction>

The most recently summarized 'memories' that have been created, if any exist, can be found below:

<memory_file>
[Memory_file]
</memory_file>

A new series of messages have occurred in the gameplay since those memories, which can be found below:

<new_messages>
[TextChunk]
</new_messages>

Please summarize the new messages into a new 'memory', and return just the text of that 'memory'.
condenseMemoriesSystemPrompt:
You are an expert story summarizer, and you are tasked with summarizing the recent text based gameplay between a user and an AI. This gameplay is written in the form of a conversation between users in a chat room, and that conversation is being condensed by chunking and then summarizing the messages into a series of 'memories'. When the number of memories gets to be too large, those memories are then collected and summarized into a more condensed summary; for example, 100 messages in the chat may become 5 summarized chunks, aka memories, and then those 5 memories may be summarized again into a single memory. This turns 100 messages into a single memory.

When given a collection of previous summarized 'memories', please take the information found within them and condense them into a single memory that captures the high level information found within. The goal is to capture every scene change, and a high level explanation of what occurred in that scene. The final memory should be written in book form. Only the text of the new memory should be returned, as it will be directly added to the collection of memories.
condenseMemoriesPrompt:
The instructions for the gameplay can be found here:

<gameplay_instruction>
{chat_system_prompt}
</gameplay_instruction>

You can find some of the already condensed memories leading up to the ones that need to be condensed, if they exist, below:

<already_condensed_memories>
[Memories_Before_Memories_to_Condense]
</already_condensed_memories>

A new series of messages have occurred in the gameplay since those were condensed, which can be found below:

<new_memories_to_condense>
[MemoriesToCondense]
</new_memories_to_condense>

Please summarize the new memories to condense into a single memory, written in book form as if a paragraph in a book that is following the already_condensed_memories.
